name: Jiroubou
description: Jiroubou is the largest member of the Sound four. His fighting style involves powerful physical attacks in combination with manipulation of earth.

skills.name: Nirvana Fist Style
skills.description: Jiroubou deals 30 damage to one enemy. The following turn, 'Earth Seal Mud Cannonball' will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Earth Seal Mud Cannonball
skills.description: Jiroubou deals 20 damage to all enemies. The following turn, 'Nirvana Fist Style' will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Dungeon Chamber of Nothingness
skills.description: Jiroubou captures the enemy team in a prison of earth, stealing 2 random chakra from their pool. Jiroubou and all allies become invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Earth Wall Land Flip
skills.description: This skill makes Jiroubou invulnerable for 1 turn.
